root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) as group_control_name , to_snumber( sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) ) as item_amount
from sc_com_m_receipt , sc_com_m_receipt_item , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_com_m_branch
where 1=1 and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'SH' and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id <> 'CLR' /*WHERE*/
group by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control
order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control asc
